summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Website Settings 10-Tab Configuration and Training Academy Feature. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working including 10 tabs, Training Academy fields, public page, navigation link, and access control.
critical_code_review_comments: WebsiteSettingsPage.jsx is over 1000 lines - consider splitting tab content into separate components for better maintainability
Minor eslint warning: useCallback received a function whose dependencies are unknown (line 86) - pass inline function instead
seed_data_creation: Test sections created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Website Settings is fully functional with 10-tab configuration. Tabs: Navigation, Home, Diploma, Faculty, Admissions, About Us, Contact, Blog, Training Academy, Footer. Training Academy page at /training-academy is public and displays CMS content. Access control working - manager and sales users are correctly blocked from Website Settings.

backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/website-settings/academy (publi: WORKING - no auth required for public Training Academy content

frontend_features.10 tabs visible: WORKING - Navigation, Home, Diploma, Faculty, Admissions, About Us, Contact, Blog, Training Academy, Footer
frontend_features.Tab switching: WORKING - each tab shows appropriate form fields

Training Academy tab fields.Facility Highlights: WORKING - ListEditor with Add Highlight button
Training Academy tab fields.Academy Gallery: WORKING - ListEditor with Add Gallery Image button
Training Academy tab fields.Training Sections: WORKING - ListEditor with Add Training Section button
Training Academy tab fields.Location Information: WORKING - Location Title, Address, Location Description, Google Maps Embed URL
Training Academy tab fields.CTA Button: WORKING - CTA Button Text, CTA Button URL

frontend_features.Save button triggers API: WORKING - shows success toast 'Training Academy saved successfully'
frontend_features.Public Training Academy page: WORKING - /training-academy displays CMS content with hero, description, highlights, location, CTA sections
frontend_features.Training Academy nav link: WORKING - visible in main navigation navbar
frontend_features.Access control (frontend): WORKING - manager redirected to /portal/crm when trying to access Website Settings

public_training_academy_page_sections.academy-hero: WORKING - displays page title, subtitle, hero image, CTA button
public_training_academy_page_sections.academy-gallery: CONDITIONAL - displays if gallery items added
public_training_academy_page_sections.academy-sections: CONDITIONAL - displays if training sections added
public_training_academy_page_sections.academy-location: WORKING - displays location info and map embed
public_training_academy_page_sections.academy-cta: WORKING - displays bottom call to action section

design_review.layout: Clean, organized layout with tabs at top and content below
design_review.spacing: Proper spacing between form fields and sections
design_review.contrast: Good contrast - dark text on light backgrounds
design_review.buttons: Save buttons clearly visible at bottom right of each tab
design_review.public_page: Professional design with proper sections, gradient backgrounds, and responsive layout
